pattern: AI is the event grammar, not a niche track
evidence: 1513 exhibitors (48.0%) and 528 speakers (46.6%) carry the AI/Robotics tag.
why_it_matters: AI is broad enough that simply being AI-tagged is not differentiated; the sharper signal is which adjacent tags it combines with.

pattern: The stage is less exhibitor-backed than the expo floor
evidence: Only 355 of 1133 speakers (31.3%) match an exhibitor by normalized company/alias; 191 of 3153 exhibitors (6.1%) have at least one matched speaker.
why_it_matters: The program is not just a booth amplification layer; it is heavily curated around institutions, media, investors, and companies absent from the exhibitor list.

pattern: Startups dominate supply, but speaker attention is much scarcer
evidence: 2719 of 3153 exhibitors are startups (86.2%), yet only 81 matched speakers attach to startup exhibitors.
why_it_matters: The expo floor is a startup marketplace, while the speaker layer behaves more like a reputation and agenda-setting market.

evidence: Partner exhibitors are 434 of 3153 companies (13.8%) but hold 274 matched speaker slots (77.2% of matched speakers).
why_it_matters: Agenda presence is structurally easier for partner-class organizations than for the long-tail startup floor.

pattern: The public exhibitor list is thin on narrative data
evidence: 3153 exhibitors (100.0%) have an empty short description in the listing payload; 1349 (42.8%) have no fundraising field.
why_it_matters: Discovery from the listing itself is mostly taxonomy/location-driven, not proposition-driven; text mining descriptions would be misleading here.

pattern: Speaker mindshare is concentrated at the top
evidence: The top 10 speaker organizations account for 74 speakers (6.5%). Top listed orgs include L'Oréal, PwC, OVHcloud, Le Jamel Comedy Club, EssilorLuxottica.
why_it_matters: A few institutions can shape the perceived agenda more than their booth footprint would suggest.

pattern: Korea is split into two country values
evidence: South Korea has 96 exhibitors while raw value `korearepublicof` has 57 exhibitors.
why_it_matters: Country comparisons need normalization before official ranking or market-priority claims.
